description: Style NoteEpitomising uptown cool, these pumped-up kicks from lee Copper add a refined touch to your casual ensemble. Designed like a lifestyle shoe but equipped with sport shoe features, this pair is perfect for a shopping run on the city sidewalk, a quick coffee date or a fun game of soccer with the neighbourhood brats. Product DetailsWhite, blunt toed casual shoe with red overlays and plastic covered inlaysPerforations on the forefoot region for breathabilityCentral lace-ups with a padded tongue and fabric innerUpper adhered to the TPU outsoleTwo piece outsole grooves at the periphery with patterned grooves and lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
